Pebble smartwatch app for golf score tracking and static byte arrays for golf API icon PNG data.


## Files
- **[golf.c](golf.c.md)**: A Pebble smartwatch app for golf score tracking, using app messages for data synchronization and UI management.
- **[golf_resources.h](golf_resources.h.md)**: Defines static byte arrays for golf API icon PNG data used in the Pebble firmware.
